mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in nonfarm payrolls indicates expanding labor income and consumer demand, which drives corporate revenue expectations higher and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are not positive in at least 55% of months when PAYEMS grows, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 5% signals restrictive monetary policy that raises discount rates and corporate borrowing costs, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in fewer than 55% of triggered instances over any 3-year rolling window, or the mean return is not significantly below zero (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in industrial production and increases in the unemployment rate confirm a contractionary divergence between output and labor markets, predicting negative S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are not negative in at least 60% of instances when INDPRO declines and UNRATE rises, or Rank IC is above -0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts during a monetary tightening cycle transmit drag through construction and financial sectors, amplifying recession risk and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Negative HOUST momentum in periods with FEDFUNDS above 5% fails to produce negative 60-day returns in at least 55% of instances over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in retail sales signals weakening consumer spending and downward revisions to corporate revenue, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in fewer than 55% of months when RSAFS contracts, or the mean return is not significantly below zero (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in industrial production reflects manufacturing sector health and capital expenditure growth, supporting earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are not positive in at least 55% of instances when INDPRO accelerates, or Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI inflation without offsetting monetary easing increases real discount rates and input cost pressures, eroding equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in fewer than 55% of triggered inflationary episodes, or the signal Rank IC is above -0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in housing starts drives demand for construction materials, durable goods, and credit expansion, lifting cyclical earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are not positive in at least 55% of instances when HOUST grows, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.
